Latest News

Keep updated on the latest news, campaigns and our work on behalf of voters in Bolsover.

  • Communications Officer (Digital Content Specialist) vacancy in Natalie Fleet MP’s office

    Natalie Fleet MP is seeking to recruit a Communications Officer (Digital Content Specialist) to join her Westminster office.

    01/05/2026
    Read More
  • Interview: Natalie Fleet MP on grooming, statutory rape and fighting back

    At 15, she began seeing an older man and conceived her beloved daughter. It was years before she properly understood it as abuse. Now she is working tirelessly in parliament for other survivors

    06/11/2025
    Read More
  • “This will protect grooming victims”: Derbyshire MP tables legal reforms to shield children from sex offender parents

    Bolsover MP Natalie Fleet made a significant breakthrough this week in her long-running campaign for legal reform to protect children whose parents are convicted of sex offences, as she tabled the necessary legislation in the House of Commons.

    23/10/2025
    Read More

Social Feed

To stay updated on local events and opportunities to meet, follow me on social media.

Facebook X-twitter Instagram Envelope
Natalie Fleet MP
15 hours ago

It was a pleasure to visit Cygnet Manor Cygnet Group in Shirebrook – a high dependency complex care service for men with learning disabilities and associated complex needs.

They get patients from all over England as admission is based on need, not location. Their treatment pathways can include support from psychology, speech and language, occupational therapy and more. As with so much in healthcare, funding is the biggest barrier, but they are working hard to give their residents the best experience possible.

The staff clearly care about their patients and showed real pride when talking about those who successfully moved on to live in the community. ... See MoreSee Less

View Comments likes love haha 28 Comments: 0 Shares: 1
Share
Share on Facebook Share on Twitter Share on Linked In Share by Email

Natalie Fleet MP
3 days ago

Clowne Infant and Nursery School – curious children, dedicated staff, and the honour of wearing the gold ‘Crimes against handwriting’ hat in Class 3: ACE.

As with every school I visit, staff are working so hard to support children with special educational needs. We need to see Derbyshire County Council using the nearly £2 million increase in high-need funding from the government to make a real difference for these pupils, their families, their schools, and their staff. ... See MoreSee Less

Natalie Fleet MP
4 days ago

It was a pleasure to meet Julia and Simon from South Normanton in Parliament. I managed to secure them tickets to PMQs and it sounds like it was quite a fascinating exchange they watched!

If you are interested in visiting Parliament, taking a tour, or attending the gallery, my team and I can help to arrange this for you – don't hesitate to get in touch. ... See MoreSee Less

View Comments likes love haha sad angry 54 Comments: 36 Shares: 1
Share
Share on Facebook Share on Twitter Share on Linked In Share by Email

36 CommentsComment on Facebook

Natalie Fleet MP
5 days ago

On Workers’ Memorial Day, I’m thinking back to last September, when I had the privilege of attending the 75th memorial service for the Creswell Colliery disaster at St Mary Magdalene Church.

It was a truly moving service. One gentleman told me how his father had swapped shifts with a man who was tragically killed that day. Another spoke about losing his father as a baby and growing up without ever knowing him.

And then there are those who still carry the loss of friends and colleagues all these years on, a reminder of just how far-reaching the impact of workplace tragedy can be.

Today is about remembering them and renewing our commitment to making sure every worker is safe, protected, and able to come home to their loved ones. ... See MoreSee Less

View Comments likes love haha 45 Comments: 11 Shares: 0
Share
Share on Facebook Share on Twitter Share on Linked In Share by Email

11 CommentsComment on Facebook

Natalie Fleet MP
5 days ago

I am hosting a SEND Roundtable to discuss your views on The Schools White Paper 2026: Special Educational Needs and Disability (SEND) Reform

If you are a parent or carer, SEND professional or teacher, I'd love to hear from you.

Please RSVP to [email protected] including your address and phone number. Please note that spaces are limited due to room size, but I will be providing updates to consituents following the meeting.

You can read about The Schools White Paper here: www.gov.uk/government/publications/school-send-reforms-sheets ... See MoreSee Less

Natalie Fleet MP
6 days ago

What a fab time we had last night at the Ladies Breast Cancer Charity Night supporting CoppaFeel! Thanks to Becky and Jade for arranging such a fun-filled night - I hope you raised lots of money - I know my purse was empty at the end of the night!! ... See MoreSee Less

Natalie Fleet MP
1 week ago

I have been informed that The Post Office at Shuttlewood closed on 13th April. This closure should be temporary and they are working to reopen it as quickly as they can.

I am trying to get more information about what has happened, but in the meantime, local residents can read a message from The Post Office's National Consultation Team on the following link: www.postofficeviews.co.uk/national-consultation-team/shuttlewood-s44-6qt-647340 ... See MoreSee Less

GET IN TOUCH

As your MP for Bolsover, I can help you with advice on issues such as; benefits, immigration, tax issues, problems with the NHS, child maintenance and education matters.

I would love to hear from you about what you think my priorities should be as your MP and what matters most to you.

Please use the contact form to get in touch with me. Please remember to provide as many details as possible, including your name, address and full details of your issue.

  • 0207 219 5665
  • natalie.fleet.mp@parliament.uk
Contact (Footer)

Social Network

Get Involved

Please use the contact form here to get in touch with me and find out more about my campaigns, priorities and how to get involved. Please remember to provide as many details as possible, including your full contact details.
